description: Deal damage to overlapping entities of a target tag, with per-target cooldown, optional knockback and self-destruct. One of the four reuse-proof parts.

cooldown.description: Seconds before re-hitting the same target (0 = every tick).

knockback.description: Impulse applied to the victim away from this entity.

selfDestruct.description: Destroy this entity after a successful hit.

sound.description: Sound key on a successful hit.
